issue.title: TableV2MultiAccountReplica missing top-level SSESpecification
issue.body: Describe the bug. Using TableV2MultiAccountReplica with customerManagedKey generates invalid CloudFormation. Steps to reproduce: synth the construct and deploy. Expected behavior: top-level SSESpecification is rendered. Actual behavior: deployment fails. Suggested fix: render the same SSESpecification as TableV2 and verify with unit tests.

repository.description: Cloud development kit for infrastructure as code

reasons: Open PR evidence means this should not be recommended.

issue.title: Fix CLI config reload panic after workspace switch
issue.body: Steps to reproduce: run the CLI, switch workspaces, then reload config. Actual behavior is a panic in src/config.rs. Expected behavior is a clean reload with a useful error. Suggested fix: guard the stale workspace handle and add a regression test.

repository.description: Rust CLI developer tools for workspace automation

reasons: Represents V4 completion discovering an open PR after a missing-timeline candidate was initially attractive.

issue.title: Add regression test for CLI workspace path normalization
issue.body: The CLI normalizes workspace paths differently on Windows and Linux. Steps to reproduce: create a workspace with a mixed-case path, run the resolver, and compare the generated lockfile. Expected behavior: normalized paths are stable. Suggested fix: normalize through the shared path helper and verify with cargo test.

repository.description: Rust CLI developer tools for workspace automation

reasons: Represents V4 completion finding no competition and preserving an actionable trusted candidate.

issue.title: Fix CLI plugin install error message
issue.body: Plugin install prints a misleading success message even when validation fails. Reproduce by installing a plugin with a malformed manifest. Expected behavior: report the validation error and leave the plugin disabled. Add a unit test for the manifest validator.

repository.description: TypeScript and Rust CLI plugin manager

comments.body: I am working on this and opened a PR with the first fix.

reasons: Represents V4 completion where comment claim and timeline PR evidence agree that the issue is occupied.

issue.title: Inconsistencies in Amplify init framework selection flow
issue.body: When running init in an empty folder, selecting angular fails early while other frameworks allow environment creation. Expected behavior: framework validation is consistent. Suggested fix: remove the angular-specific validation and verify with init flow tests.

comments.body: Hello, I am new to open source and would love to contribute to this project. Could this issue be assigned to me?

reasons: Claimed issue should not remain visible.

issue.title: Tab focus order and screen reader text for column headers
issue.body: Keyboard focus moves to row checkboxes instead of the next column header. Screen reader row and column announcements are incorrect.

issue.title: DynamicRangeInput
issue.body: Feature request/question. Is there a way to combine DynamicRangeSlider min/max display with RangeInput value editing?

comments.body: I've solved this problem by using an external Elasticsearch API call to store the min/max values in state.

reasons: Solved support-question workaround should not rank as an open implementation issue.

issue.title: [feat] Log parent package when erroring during dependency install
issue.body: When uv fails during dependency install, the error does not show the parent package that introduced the dependency. Expected behavior: CLI logs the parent package chain.

repository.description: Fast Python package manager and CLI

comments.body: I verified this against current master and the parent chain is now shown. Looks like this issue can be closed.

reasons: Comment evidence says the issue is fixed enough to close.

issue.title: Standardize predictors for ARD
issue.body: Examples should standardize input data for ARD kernels to avoid zero gradients. Suggested fix: update docs and examples with standardized predictors.

issue.title: Para components should use theme.fontSize.base or theme.fontSize.text
issue.body: Current behavior: markdown paragraph content generated by styleguidist does not use the configured theme font size. To reproduce: configure theme.fontSize.text and render markdown. Expected behavior: paragraph text inherits the configured text size.

reasons: Old issue can be visible only below fresher strong matches.

issue.title: [preview2-shim] Runtime values are exported only as types
issue.body: In a TypeScript project using js-component-bindgen, preview2-shim runtime values such as streams are exported only as types. Expected behavior: runtime values are available at runtime and in generated declarations. Suggested fix: update generated type exports and add a regression test.

repository.description: JavaScript tooling for WebAssembly components and TypeScript bindings

comments.body: This should be a pretty easy fix, but we should add a regression test.

reasons: Overlay trusted small repo with strong profile fit should not be buried by large weak-profile repos.

issue.title: EPIC: Support for vLLM
issue.body: Epic domain: extend local model execution support from LlamaCPP to vLLM. Scope includes CPU-only images for Mac and Windows, research and feasibility analysis for GPU support, and benchmark suite work. Subtasks include separate CPU image work, GPU research, and benchmark tooling.

repository.description: Developer tool for running AI models with containers

reasons: Old broad EPIC should not remain visible as a default-profile recommendation.
